languages.text: "В самом деле? Не тяните. Нужно разобраться как можно скорее. Нельзя идти навстречу врагу, когда кто-то целит ножом в спину".

traits.locale_text: "В самом деле? Не тяните. Нужно разобраться как можно скорее. Нельзя идти навстречу врагу, когда кто-то целит ножом в спину".

languages.text: "Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."
languages.original_text: "В самом деле? Не тяните. Нужно разобраться как можно скорее. Нельзя идти навстречу врагу, когда кто-то целит ножом в спину".

traits.locale_text: "Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."
"Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."
"Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."

languages.text: “当真？好，那就说吧。这事得尽快解决。背后顶着刀子，可没法全力迎敌。”
languages.original_text: "Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."

traits.locale_text: “当真？好，那就说吧。这事得尽快解决。背后顶着刀子，可没法全力迎敌。”

languages.text: « Dans ce cas, parlez, et vite. Nous devons régler cette affaire dans les plus brefs délais. On n'affronte pas ses ennemis avec une lame braquée dans le dos. »
languages.original_text: "Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."

traits.locale_text: « Dans ce cas, parlez, et vite. Nous devons régler cette affaire dans les plus brefs délais. On n'affronte pas ses ennemis avec une lame braquée dans le dos. »

languages.text: "Gerçekten mi? Pekâlâ, dinliyorum. Bu meseleyi tez vakitte nihayete erdirmeliyiz. Sırtında bıçakla düşmanın karşısına çıkamazsın."
languages.original_text: "Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekten mi? Pekâlâ, dinliyorum. Bu meseleyi tez vakitte nihayete erdirmeliyiz. Sırtında bıçakla düşmanın karşısına çıkamazsın."

languages.text: «¿De veras? Bueno, adelante. Debemos solucionar esto lo antes posible. No es posible rechazar al enemigo cuando alguien apunta a tu espalda con un cuchillo».
languages.original_text: "Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."

traits.locale_text: «¿De veras? Bueno, adelante. Debemos solucionar esto lo antes posible. No es posible rechazar al enemigo cuando alguien apunta a tu espalda con un cuchillo».

languages.text: "Wirklich? Na, dann raus damit. Wir müssen das hier schnellstmöglich regeln. Mit einem Messer im Rücken kann man sich dem Feind nicht stellen."
languages.original_text: "Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."

traits.locale_text: "Wirklich? Na, dann raus damit. Wir müssen das hier schnellstmöglich regeln. Mit einem Messer im Rücken kann man sich dem Feind nicht stellen."

languages.text: 「本当に？じゃあ、早く言ってくれ。できるだけ早く決着をつけなければならない。背後から刀を突きつけられている状態で敵と向かうことはできない」
languages.original_text: "Really? Well, out with it. We need to settle this as quickly as possible. You cannot face the enemy with someone holding a knife to your back."

traits.locale_text: 「本当に？じゃあ、早く言ってくれ。できるだけ早く決着をつけなければならない。背後から刀を突きつけられている状態で敵と向かうことはできない」
